value.found_quote: Resume prior development threads, scope active histories to local workspaces, and fork conversations to experiment with alternate architectures. ... You can return to a prior conversation to continue an implementation or refine an existing solution. ... The `/fork` command clones your entire conversation history up to the current turn into a new, independent session.
value.rationale: The page explicitly documents both "Resuming sessions" (continuing a previous session via `/resume`, `--continue`, or `--conversation`) and "Branching with `/fork`" (forking/branching a previous session into a new independent session). This directly substantiates the claim that the offering includes resume/fork session functionality. The page presents these as current, available features with no indication of preview or deprecation status.
